name: Buttered Fried Parsnips
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the parsnips and trim them of any excess greens or bark.
2. Cut into uniform pieces.
3. Boil in salted water for 25 to 30 minutes or until tender.
4. Drain well and let cool.
5. In a large skillet, heat butter over moderate heat.
6. Add the parsnip pieces and sauté until light brown on all sides.
7. Let caramelize slightly in their own juices.
8. Season with nutmeg, salt, and pepper.
9. Serve warm in a vegetable dish garnished with parsley.
